title: [Progress on functional genomics of some important zoonotic parasites].
author_string: Ai, Lin, Chen, Shao-hong, Chen, Jia-xu
journal: Zhongguo Ji Sheng Chong Xue Yu Ji Sheng Chong Bing Za Zhi
journal_full: Zhongguo ji sheng chong xue yu ji sheng chong bing za zhi = Chinese journal of parasitology & parasitic diseases
abstract: With the development of molecular biology, genomics research has been expanded from structural genomics to functional genomics, and from single gene to massive batch. This paper summarizes the progress of structural genomics of some zoonotic parasites and major technical methods.
